SHIPPING INFORMATION: Ram Fixture makes every effort send your shipment the best way: via UPS Common Carrier FOB Factory.
you have preferred carrier, will make every attempt comply, however, handling charge may applied.
All shipping and handling charges are the responsibility the customer.
Common Carriers tailgate trucks provide dock service only, and unloading the Customer's responsibility.
Transporting the merchandise inside also the Customer's responsibility.
Inside delivery may available your delivery area for additional charge.
Upon request, will glad provide freight estimate for your order.
This only estimate and the Customer responsible for all actual freight charges incurred.
accept VISA, MasterCard, American Express Discover.
Your credit card will run twice.
Once for the merchandise and second for the actual freight charges.
Actual freight may differ from your freight estimate.
Check: Order may pre-paid check.
Check must clear before the order shipped.
COD: will ship COD orders return customers.
Electronic Funds Transfer- Available, please inquire info@ramfixture.com.
FREIGHT AMOUNTS: freight estimate for all UPSable items will supplied the time orders are placed.
Freight amounts are estimates only and all final shipping costs will paid customer.
All non UPSable Common carrier freight amounts will given you prior shipment charging your credit card.
ORDERING FAX, MAIL EMAIL: Please send all fax, mail email orders the attention our Sales Department info@ramfixture.com.
Include your name, business name, complete address, telephone number and method payment.
Specify item numbers, colors, quantities and descriptions.
Once the order received and processed you will contacted with freight information and get credit card authorization.
SMALL ORDERS: All orders under $<hide>.<hide> are subject $<hide>.<hide> small order fee.
CUSTOMER SERVICE: Our Customer Service Department will glad assist you you have any problems concerns about order.
expedite the process, have your order number shipment number ready.
error occurs with your order that attributed us, please contact representative immediately.
the error requires another shipment, will ship freight free soon possible the same level service original shipment.
Any expedited level service above the original order will incur additional charges.
Errors attributed the carrier will handled throght the claims process.
RETURNS: will gladly accept any return stock merchandise within days invoice for store credit.
Please call obtain Return Authorization Numbe before returning any merchandise since our receiving department will not accept anything without Return Authroization Number.
Returns must the original carton resalable condition, must include copy the invoice, and must have freight charges prepaid.
Some items are subject <hide>% restocking fee.
returns are accepted after days.
Special Orders, Custom Built Displays, Slatwall, Showcase/Counters, Tradeshow Items, Floor Samples, closeouts, USED items, outdoor banners, holiday and seasonal items are non refundable.
DAMAGES: Please inspect, count and open all cartons the time packages are delivered.
The carrier responsible for damage transit.
UPS damage: you discover damage after opening package, call UPS for inspection.
Save all packing materials.
not return package Ram Fixture.
Common Carrier Damage: All shipments are insured against damage transit.
the Customer's responsibility inspect all packages and cartons the time deliver.
the Customer's responsibility count all packages, note any visible damages, and file all freight claims.
When carton visibly damaged upon arrival, MUST INDICATED WHEN SIGNING THE TRUCK BILL LADING.
The driver should sign both copies.
This protect you and enable you file claim without issues, with the carrier.
Concealed Damage: AFTER OPENING THE PACKAGE, CALL CARRIER IMMEDIATELY FOR INSPECTION.
SAVE ALL PACKING MATERIALS.
You must file claim with the carrier WITHIN DAYS signing for freight.
will glad assist you the process.
IMPORTANT OPEN ALL CARTONS IMMEDIATELY ELIGIBLE FILE FREIGHT CLAIM.
Ram Fixture cannot held responsible for loss damage after delivery common carrier.
SPECIAL ORDERS: Ram Fixture will gladly provide pricing non-stock items.
non-refundable deposit will required for all Special Orders.
Proposal signed the customer must accompany all deposits.
Deposits may made using any standard payment form.
Deposits paid check are subject our Check Guarantee Program.
Special Orders ARE NON REFUNDABLE.
PRICING: All prices are subject change without notice.
While every effort made accurate possible, reserve the right correct any error description price.
BACK ORDERS: Any item not stock time original shipment will shipped when stock replenished and seperate shipping charges will apply.
REFUSE UNDELIVERABLE PACKAGES SHIPMENTS: the event that the carrier unable deliver your shipment packages for any reason that not the fault Ram Fixture, the outbound and return freight, well any re-delivery fees where applicable are not subject refund, upon return the merchandise.
ensure you receive the merchandise you have ordered, please communicate any special delivery needs through your deliverying agent.
EXPEDITED SHIPPING: UPS Next Day <hide>nd Day estimated freight charges are given the time online purchase.
expedite your order please state this under "Comments" checkout.
Ram Fixture ships Monday thru Friday only.
Expedited shipments must placed and confirmed before <hide>AM Mountain time (subject stock availability).
portion your order backordered, the in-stock items will ship expedited and the backorder will ship ground, unless you contact us.
will make every attempt accommodate your expedited shipment, and would request that you call immediately after placing your order confirm.

Can be?
true?
summer finally here?
Yes, seems that despite the unpredictable weather, the seasons Pentecost and Summer have arrived!
Looking Growth your faith?
Aly Allemeier will gather families Cross+Generational fun for help growing children God.
All children God, all ages are welcome come and Share, Read, Talk, Pray and Bless!
Looking plant things that grow?
Join Saturday, June cut, trim and plant our campus.
There depth gardening that goes beyond the visible produce flowers food.
Gardens can offer much more community like fellowship!
The process gardening (weeding, preparing, planting, maintaining, harvesting) enhances the relationships the community well.
Perhaps you’re looking for place gather friends Christ’s name?
The Friendship Place wonderful addition the fellowship space the Messiah campus.
also good space quiet, pray, share food study God’s Word with friend.
Come inside, bring friend make new friend and enjoy our welcoming Friendship Place!
“Glory God Forever,” Gloria Dei’s anthem the Day Pentecost, June was written <hide> the contemporary Christian musician, Steve Fee, who has said that, although the song has simple message, “Glory God Forever!,” also has great request God give the faith and strength that everything our lives given His glory: reflecting His mercy, justice and grace.
This song and its message one favorites.
John, Peter, Andrew, and thank you for being part our faith community, supporting and celebrating with through the years.
has been blessing member since <hide>, and serve the weekly musician since <hide>.
have learned much, worked with each the pastors who served here.
have enjoyed working with the Gloria Dei Choir, faithful group volunteers who have done and sung all I’ve asked.
Thank you for your dedication!
also want thank those people, too numerous mention, who shared their musical gifts, both vocal and instrumental, worship.
prepare leave, pray God may continue bless Messiah’s congregation and give each the faith and strength continue live our lives His glory!
*<hide> unique individuals attended worship between and times April.
Sunday, June will welcome three full members our flock (above, from left): Samantha Fogel, Caitlin Levy and Ralphie Lippert.
Confirmation marks the completion the congregation's program confirmation ministry, period instruction the Christian faith confessed the teachings the Lutheran Church.
Help welcoming and supporting our confirmands they officially join our community.
Trygve Jensen will representing one the two Messiah delegate positions.
you are interested participating this annual event this year, please let the office know.
Thursday, July p.m.
will discuss the book “The Readers Broken Wheel Recommend” Katarina Bivald.
Book Club open anyone who enjoys reading.
“The Readers Broken Wheel Recommend" novel about shy Swedish woman who changes small Iowa town opening bookshop.
Brotherhood Breakfast Saturday, June a.m. All men Messiah are invited!
meet Just Like Home, <hide> Dempster St. Niles.
Godspeed for Sue Fox Sunday, June Come show our gratitude Sue for all the fine years service she’s given Messiah!
Quilts Kits Quilt assembly will Sunday, June after worship service!
Snacks will available and sewing experience necessary!
CHAT Room Confirmation Class until Fall!
Samantha Fogel, daughter Pastor Lynne Morrow and Larry Fogel, will graduate from eighth grade Lake Zurich Middle School South.
Caitlin Levy, daughter Rich and Helen Levy, will graduate from eighth grade Emerson Middle School.
Rachel Daye, granddaughter Diane Wilson, will graduate Richmond Burton Community High School.
Philip Holzer, son Paul and Julie Holzer, will graduate Maine West High School.
Ralphie Lippert, son Ralph and Teresa Lippert, will graduate from eighth grade Emerson Middle School.
Emma Jayne Hanson, granddaughter David and Donna Hanson, will graduate from Waukee High School Waukee, IA.
Jessica Schneider, daughter Jennifer and Rich Schneider, will graduate from Algonquin Middle School.
from fifth grade Franklin.
donation was made for Quilts Kits honor Samantha Fogel’s confirmation, Millie Anderson.
ONLY PARKING PASSES WILL AVAILABLE FOR THE BACK (EAST) LOT FOR JULY PROCEEDS FROM THIS FUNDRAISER MAP (TOWARDS THE LOAN PAYMENT).
ARE SUGGESTING DONATION $<hide> (THE SAME AMOUNT MAINE EAST CHARGING) FOR EACH PASS, WHICH GUARANTEES SPOT OUR LOT.
YOU WANT PASS, CONTACT THE CHURCH OFFICE SOON.
YOU WILL HAVE COME INTO THE OFFICE PURCHASE PASS, AND CASH CHECK ONLY.
THEY ARE LIMITED AND WILL QUICKLY.
THE MAIN (NORTH) LOT WILL OPEN THE PUBLIC JULY FIRST-COME, FIRST-SERVED BASIS.
You made the music for our worship!
This place won’t the same without you!
also wish express our deepest thanks the Gloria Dei Choir and our instrumental performers for another year magnificent worship music.
You have our gratitude.
Flat Jesus paper doll children all ages can cut out and color.
When Flat Jesus arrives his destination, photograph and document his adventures.
you lose Flat Jesus, don’t worry!
(in electronic format) can found our website:
September, we’ll host Welcome Home party for Flat Jesus and find out where has been all summer!
pleasure welcome Kathy Malyszko the CCC Board the community representative.
Kathy serves out her vocational call Mental Health Counselor with Maine East School-Based Health Center well new position with Advocate working with children with obesity.
She has passion for children and very aware the needs the community.
Kathy has heard many positive comments about Messiah's CCC and looks forward serving with you all.
For kits, continue focus gathering towels and soap for the Personal Care Kits.
you don’t feel like shopping, can shop for you for donation per towel (Walmart has good deal decent towels).
We’re also focused collecting full-size <hide>-ounce <hide>-ounce bars soap.
continue focus assembling quilts once month following worship service the Friendship Place: June <hide>, July <hide>, Aug. <hide>.
Mark your calendars!!
And remember sewing experience necessary!
For information volunteer, call Carol Hrodey <hide>-<hide>-<hide> email
Pastor Byung Yun Jeong and his wife, Sun Yeo Jeong, Hope Korean Community Church, will living the Parsonage for while this summer.
The missionaries waiting for the go-ahead take the Word Nepal.
They serve with Pastor Song Hope Korean Community Church, which worships the church building Sunday afternoons.
Several Boy Scouts from Pack <hide> were scheduled clear buckthorn and other wild plants from the Messiah Lutheran Church grounds Saturday, June
The work was part landscaping effort headed property coordinator David Hanson.
Those who wish help out either with labor contributions may email Dave dghanso@gmail.com.
Students who received their First Communion Messiah Lutheran during worship services May were: Marina Cooper, Annabelle Grove, Melanie Diaz, Millie Diaz and Henry Allemeier.
The Messiah Child Care Center's annual Fun Fair was held May the campus the school.
want remember our prayers military and first responder personnel (those known and those serving who are not known us): Brandon Ajyek, Tim David, Tyler Daye, Bobby Hanson, Tom Hanson, Andreas Johnsen, Jason Koesler, Sam Krawitz, Joey Rosequist, Claudine Ward, Matt McGannon.
celebrated the confirmations Samantha Fogel, Caitlin Levy and Ralphie Lippert Pentecost Sunday, June during our regular worship.
were thrilled May celebrate The Lord’s Supper with the students the First Communion class: Henry Allemeier, Marina Cooper, Melanie Diaz, Millie Diaz and Annabelle Grove.
celebrated with Christian Travis and his bass fishing team were chosen for state competition representing Niles West HS.
congratulate Mikey Hanson, who will join U.S. Marine Corps upon graduation from Maine West High School.
Oohrah!

result, the Zetafax SMTP Server does not parse this field properly and only partial address forwarded onto the Zetafax Server.
The truncated FROM address can seen the Zetafax Server Monitor the following line: ‘Message from:’ (note that there data).
working system will display the following log line: ‘Message from: address@company.com’.
update available here address the first issue.
This includes fix allow Zetafax SMTP Server parse addresses with line breaks correctly.
Please refer ZTN<hide> for instructions importing list SMTP users and enabling them.
This behaviour was corrected the update and technote detailed above.
